name: ai-expert-skills
description: Domain-specific expert skills for AI coding assistants: language experts, deep learning, LLM testing, architecture, GitHub, and Three.js.

plugins.name: competitive-programming-expert
plugins.description: Algorithmic problem solving, complexity analysis, and optimization for LeetCode/Codeforces/AtCoder.

plugins.name: cpp-expert
plugins.description: Modern C++ (17/20/23) expert for safe, performant code, templates, and UB/memory diagnosis.

plugins.name: python-expert
plugins.description: Pythonic code, typing, async, standard-library usage, and performance tuning.

plugins.name: deep-learning-expert
plugins.description: Model architecture design, training strategies, debugging, and paper interpretation (PyTorch/TensorFlow).

plugins.name: llm-testing-expert
plugins.description: Evaluation strategies, prompt engineering, red teaming, and regression testing for LLMs.

plugins.name: software-architect
plugins.description: High-level system design, technology selection, and architecture trade-off analysis.

plugins.name: github-master
plugins.description: Git workflows, repository management, pull requests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

plugins.name: threejs
plugins.description: Complete Three.js skill set: fundamentals, geometry, materials, lighting, textures, animation, loaders, shaders, post-processing, and interaction.

plugins.name: typescript-expert
plugins.description: TypeScript type system, generics, narrowing, and strict-mode config for safe, maintainable JS/TS.

plugins.name: rust-expert
plugins.description: Rust ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, traits, async, and idiomatic error handling.

plugins.name: go-expert
plugins.description: Idiomatic Go: goroutines, channels, interfaces, error handling, and the standard library.

plugins.name: react-expert
plugins.description: Modern React (18/19): hooks, component patterns, state management, performance, and Server Components.

plugins.name: nextjs-expert
plugins.description: Next.js App Router, Server Components, server actions, routing, caching, and deployment.

plugins.name: tailwind-expert
plugins.description: Tailwind CSS utility-first styling, responsive design, theming, and design-system patterns.

plugins.name: accessibility-expert
plugins.description: Web accessibility (a11y): WCAG, semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard nav, and screen-reader support.

plugins.name: nodejs-backend-expert
plugins.description: Node.js backend services with Express/Fastify/Hono: routing, middleware, auth, and async patterns.

plugins.name: api-design-expert
plugins.description: Designing REST and GraphQL APIs: resource modeling, versioning, pagination, errors, and contracts.

plugins.name: sql-expert
plugins.description: SQL queries, schema design, indexing, query optimization, and transactions across Postgres/MySQL/SQLite.

plugins.name: rag-expert
plugins.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: chunking, embeddings, vector search, reranking, and grounded answers.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering-expert
plugins.description: Designing effective prompts: structure, few-shot, chain-of-thought, output formatting, and evaluation.

plugins.name: docker-expert
plugins.description: Dockerfiles, multi-stage builds, image optimization, Compose, networking, and container best practices.

plugins.name: kubernetes-expert
plugins.description: Kubernetes workloads: Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps, probes, resources, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: bash-scripting-expert
plugins.description: Robust shell scripts: safe Bash, quoting, error handling, and portable POSIX patterns.

plugins.name: testing-expert
plugins.description: Test strategy and implementation: unit/integration/e2e, TDD, mocking, fixtures, and coverage.

plugins.name: debugging-expert
plugins.description: Systematic debugging: reproduction, hypothesis testing, bisection, logging, and root-cause analysis.

plugins.name: refactoring-expert
plugins.description: Safe, incremental refactoring: code smells, behavior-preserving transforms, and test-backed changes.

plugins.name: performance-expert
plugins.description: Profiling and optimizing CPU, memory, I/O, and rendering hotspots with measure-first methodology.

plugins.name: security-expert
plugins.description: Secure coding and review: OWASP Top 10, input validation, authn/authz, secrets, and dependency safety.
